lsp.justification: Mostly correct on subsystem classification and the USE_JEMALLOC source-file inventory, including the important point that debug.c jemalloc gates are allocator-related rather than crash reporting. However it undercounts HAVE_BACKTRACE as 11 instead of the GT’s 15 occurrences in src/debug.c and omits the Makefile-level jemalloc build/link effect that the GT explicitly calls out as a scoring dimension.
